bug-id.bugzilla.suse.token.markdownDescription: API token for [openSUSE](https://bugzilla.opensuse.org) or [SUSE](https://bugzilla.suse.com) Bugzilla (they share the user accounts). To create a new API token go to the openSUSE Bugzilla [preferences](https://bugzilla.opensuse.org/userprefs.cgi?tab=apikey) page.

bug-id.bugzilla.gcc.token.markdownDescription: API token for [GCC Bugzilla](https://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla). To create a new API token go to the Bugzilla [preferences](https://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/userprefs.cgi?tab=apikey) page.

bug-id.bugzilla.kernel.token.markdownDescription: API token for [Linux Kernel Bugzilla](https://bugzilla.kernel.org). To create a new API token go to the Bugzilla [preferences](https://bugzilla.kernel.org/userprefs.cgi?tab=apikey) page.

bug-id.bugzilla.mozilla.token.markdownDescription: API token for [Mozilla Bugzilla](https://bugzilla.mozilla.org). To create a new API token go to the Bugzilla [preferences](https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/userprefs.cgi?tab=apikey) page.

bug-id.bugzilla.kde.token.markdownDescription: API token for [KDE Bugzilla](https://bugs.kde.org). To create a new API token go to the Bugzilla [preferences](https://bugs.kde.org/userprefs.cgi?tab=apikey) page.

bug-id.bugzilla.redhat.token.markdownDescription: API token for [Redhat Bugzilla](https://bugzilla.redhat.com). To create a new API token go to the Bugzilla [preferences](https://bugzilla.redhat.com/userprefs.cgi?tab=apikey) page.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
